objective: Objectif : "Utiliser les indicateurs EMA + BOLLINGER + MA pour un trading à Court Terme sur JUPUSDC 5m (15m) dans une combinaison originale avec filtre horaire de liquidite et comportements aleatoires imposés." Entrées: - Indicadores EMA, BOLLINGER, SMA. - Filtro horario de liquidez a cada hora entre as 9 e das 17 horas (horarios de negocio). - Condicoes: Bollinger High + SMA(20) <= Volumen > SMA(60), EMA(3) < EMA(14). Sorties : Venta em caso de um crossover entre a Bollinger Band e o volume. TP = Preco+SL/Preco-TP, com SL sendo 5% sobre o mais alto ou baixo do candlestick ao dia seguinte à transacao. Risk management: SL=0,02 et TP = price +/- 0,01

iterations.hypothesis: L'utilisation des combinaisons d'indicateurs EMA, BOLLINGER, SMA permet une meilleure identification du trend avec moins de faux alerts. L'ajout d'un filtre horaire impose les conditions favorables et contre-favorables afin d'ameliorer le signal.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy uses EMA, Bollinger and SMA indicators in combination with liquidity filter and random conditions. The hypothesis is that this approach will improve trend identification while reducing false alerts. Recent history suggests a need for further refinement of the entry criteria to reduce unnecessary trades.
[Backup plan] If results are poor (negative return), we could consider adjusting our risk management parameters, such as stop loss (SL) and take profit (TP). If results are mediocre (low Sharpe ratio), we can try increasing the timeframe or changing the volatility level of Bollinger Bands. As an alternative approach, we might explore machine learning algorithms to identify trends.
